scriptItem.label: Open MorfyAI Dev
scriptItem.scriptCode: import os, sys # Force this dev root to the front so launcher_dev (and everything it imports) # resolves to the dev copy, never the release copy sharing PYTHONPATH. _r = os.environ.get('MORFYAI_DEV') if not _r: try: import hou _r = hou.getenv('MORFYAI_DEV') except Exception: _r = None if _r and os.path.isdir(_r): if _r in sys.path: sys.path.remove(_r) sys.path.insert(0, _r) sys.modules.pop('launcher_dev', None) import launcher_dev launcher_dev.show_tool()
